title: just hotbar and xp visible datapack
description: Player Health, Armor and Hunger bossbar Datapack
body:
My datapack make health, armor and hunger bar in bossbar and I made a ressource pack that made the health bar, hunger bar and armor bar invisible if you reload the datapack will show you a download link to get the ressource pack.

To get the bossbar you need to give you a tag between 0 and 9 with the command.
example: /tag @s add 0

In multiplayer you need to give a unique tag to each player between 0 and 9
example: /tag player add 1
replace player with the player's name.

If the datapack does'nt work type the command /reload
To get the ressource pack type the command /function hh:ressource

It fully work in multiplayer up to 10 players.

Have fun and enjoy.

I recently updated the datapack so the texturepack is in the datapack.<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-r0zNxiybCM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
